content:
Hey, Caio! 👋 Great to see you!

Ready to practice? **What have you been up to lately?** Tell me in English — no worries about mistakes! 😊

Nice! 👨‍💻 

Quick check — we say **"I am *a* programmer"** or **"I do programming"** (no article before the activity). 

So: *"I am a programmer"* or *"I'm into programming." ✨*

**What kind of projects are you working on right now?** 🚀

Hey there, Caio! 👋 

Looks like we're starting fresh — no problem! 😊

Let's jump in: **Tell me, what's one thing you've learned in programming this week?** 

(English or Portuguese to warm up — your call! 🎯)
